title: GSK's Disha Thakkar joins MSD as General Counsel
description: Disha Thakkar has joined MSD as General Counsel- Legal & Compliance for the India Subcontinent.Thakkar is a 2006 graduate of KC Law College, Mumbai University.She has over 18 years of diversified experience spanning law firms and in-house roles, advising on cross-border transactions, mergers & acquisitions, joint ventures, private equity, foreign direct investment, intellectual property rights, pharmaceutical laws, and general corporate legal matters.Prior to joining MSD, Thakkar served
